text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I just love the feelin' I get before a race! It's
electrifyin', like I just got struck by lightnin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah. But these nerves are just enough to
spice things up!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You can't brute force your way to victory. Ya
gotta race with a level head!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you bet I do! Keep your expectations high
today!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sit tight 'n see ya later! You're about to see what White Lightnin' can really do!
